items.title: An ingestion CLI
items.scenario: A RAG tool is run as `python ingest.py ./docs --model text-embedding-3-small --batch-size 128`.
items.explanation: argparse maps the folder to a positional arg and the tuning knobs to typed --options.

items.title: A safe --dry-run flag
items.scenario: Before a costly batch generation, you want to print what would run without calling the model.
items.explanation: action='store_true' gives a boolean args.dry_run you branch on to skip the real calls.

items.title: Restricting model choices
items.scenario: A CLI should only accept a known set of model names.
items.explanation: choices=['gpt-4o', 'gpt-4o-mini'] rejects anything else with a clear error and lists valid options in --help.

items.title: Multi-command tool
items.scenario: One tool exposes `eval`, `ingest` and `chat` subcommands with their own options.
items.explanation: add_subparsers gives each subcommand its own argument set, like git's subcommands.
